VS Code webview CSP strips external script origins at platform level. Only nonce+bundle is viable. Add img-src data: because D3 SVG force paths emit data-URI image elements. No connect-src needed - all data arrives via postMessage.","localResourceRoots_status":"Already correct: includes media/ and dist/. Never import from d3 barrel. Only esbuild.js needs changes."},"new_package_json_contributions":{"new_commands_required":[{"command":"devsteps.showSpiderWeb","title":"Show Spider Web Visualizer","category":"DevSteps","icon":"$(graph-line)"}],"new_keybinding":{"command":"devsteps.showSpiderWeb","key":"ctrl+shift+d w","mac":"cmd+shift+d w","when":"workspaceFolderCount > 0 && devsteps.initialized"},"no_new_view_container":"Spider Web is a tab inside the existing DashboardPanel WebviewPanel. No new views contribution is needed.","existing_reused":"devsteps.showDashboard opens the SPA landing page; Spider Web tab is navigated via postMessage or the new showSpiderWeb command."},"monorepo_dependency_rules":{"dependency_direction":"extension to shared is correct and already established. TraceLogger in packages/shared/src/traceLogger.ts is valid. shared must not import vscode or extension-host-only API.","extension_can_import_tracer":"Yes - import TraceLogger from @schnick371/devsteps-shared in traceWatcher.ts.","webview_bundle_constraint":"Webview bundle (platform=browser) CANNOT include @schnick371/devsteps-shared. Data flows to webview only via postMessage serialized JSON.","circular_dep_risk":"None. shared to extension direction does not exist."},"state_management_constraints":{"retainContextWhenHidden_implication":"Already true. Webview DOM and JS heap survive panel hide/show - SPA route state in JS variables persists within a session without re-sending data.","spa_routing_approach":"Use acquireVsCodeApi().setState({ activeTab: string }) for persistence across VS Code restarts. Ensure dist/webview/ is NOT in .vscodeignore."},"postmessage_protocol":{"existing_webview_to_extension":{"openItem":"{ command: 'openItem', itemId: string } - unchanged"},"new_webview_to_extension":{"ready":"{ command: 'ready' } - webview signals DOM loaded; extension responds with dashboardData plus pending traceUpdate.","requestTab":"{ command: 'requestTab', tab: string } - optional refresh trigger"},"new_extension_to_webview":{"dashboardData":"{ command: 'dashboardData', stats, eisenhower, burndown } - replaces server-side HTML rendering; required for SPA architecture.","traceUpdate":"{ command: 'traceUpdate', traces: SpiderTrace[], append: boolean } - FSWatcher push. append=true incremental, false for full reset.","navigateTo":"{ command: 'navigateTo', tab: 'landing'|'spider-web'|'stats' } - allows extension commands to route the SPA."},"handleMessage_changes":"Current switch handles only 'openItem'. This is the largest structural change required."}}
recommendations: Use format=iife (not ESM) for the webview esbuild bundle - acquireVsCodeApi() is a platform-injected global that silently breaks in ES module scope.
Import D3 only from sub-packages (d3-force, d3-selection, d3-scale, d3-shape), never from the 'd3' barrel, to keep webview bundle under 150KB minified.
Add 'img-src data:' to the CSP meta tag in _getHtmlForWebview - all other existing CSP directives are already compatible with bundled D3 and the nonce script-src.
Register WebviewPanelSerializer for 'devstepsashboard' in extension.ts - without it, retainContextWhenHidden does not persist SPA state across VS Code restarts.
TraceLogger in packages/shared must use only Node.js built-ins (node:fs/promises, node:path) to preserve shared-to-extension dep direction and allow clean webview bundle exclusion.
